description_long: This is a medium-sized, dark wood bookcase featuring four horizontal shelves filled with a variety of books and a few scattered papers. The shelves are unevenly populated, with some books standing upright, others stacked horizontally, and several open books and loose sheets adding a sense of casual use. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the bookcase a rich, natural appearance. The top surface also holds an open book, suggesting it is used for both storage and display. The back and sides are solid wood panels, with no visible openings or decorative elements. The overall design is functional and straightforward, suitable for urban interiors such as offices, libraries, or residential living spaces.
description: A dark wood bookcase with four shelves, filled with assorted books and papers. The design is practical and natural, with a lived-in appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing four shelves filled with books and papers, with an open book on top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood grain panel and the open book on the top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, uninterrupted wood panel and the open book on top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a similar solid wood panel and the open book visible on top.
